name: Toxin ingestion treatment
emergency_note: Call ASPCA Poison Control 888-426-4435 or your nearest ER immediately.

name: Urinary blockage (cat)
emergency_note: A blocked male cat is a life-threatening emergency. Go to the ER now.

name: Bloat / GDV surgery
emergency_note: Bloat is a surgical emergency. Do not delay.

name: Parvo treatment (puppy)
emergency_note: Suspected parvo in unvaccinated puppies — call your vet immediately.

name: Heatstroke treatment
emergency_note: Move to shade, apply cool (not cold) water, drive to ER.
